prompts.name: Cat Ears
prompts.text: Add expressive cat ears with soft fur, natural placement, and emotion matching the subject's expression.

prompts.name: Fox Ears
prompts.text: Add elegant fox ears with soft fur texture, pointed shape, and graceful fantasy character.

prompts.name: Bunny Ears
prompts.text: Add soft bunny ears with gentle shape, natural fur texture, and cute expressive posture.

prompts.name: Wolf Ears
prompts.text: Add wolf ears with slightly sharper shape, realistic fur detail, and alert character presence.

prompts.name: Small Horns
prompts.text: Add small horns with natural placement, smooth material, and tasteful fantasy design.

prompts.name: Large Horns
prompts.text: Add large fantasy horns with curved silhouette, natural integration, and clear character identity.

prompts.name: Feathered Wings
prompts.text: Add feathered wings with layered feathers, believable structure, and graceful placement.

prompts.name: Dragon Wings
prompts.text: Add dragon-like wings with membrane detail, bone structure, and fantasy scale.

prompts.name: Halo
prompts.text: Add a subtle halo with soft glow, clean circular form, and divine atmosphere.

prompts.name: Cat Tail
prompts.text: Add a cat tail with soft fur, natural curve, and expressive movement.

prompts.name: Fox Tail
prompts.text: Add a fluffy fox tail with thick fur, graceful curve, and fantasy charm.

prompts.name: Dragon Tail
prompts.text: Add a dragon tail with scales, tapered shape, and natural pose integration.

prompts.name: Subtle Scales
prompts.text: Add subtle scale details on skin or accessories with tasteful placement and refined texture.

prompts.name: Pointed Ears
prompts.text: Add pointed ears for an elf or fantasy character with natural anatomy and clean silhouette.

prompts.name: Glowing Markings
prompts.text: Add glowing markings on skin, clothing, or accessories with controlled brightness and coherent magical design.
